purpose: Own picture-edit craft: structure, rhythm, performance selection, coverage diagnosis, offline versions, and picture-lock execution.
stage_entry: P6-P8 only for paid animatic or timing consultation
P11-P12 for coverage or workflow consultation when invited
P13 Offline as the primary edit-craft owner
stage_exit: G9 Offline Lock with version, copy, claim, and structural decisions explicit
Picture and edit decision handoff to finish
owns: assembly, performance and shot selection, structure, rhythm, continuity, and picture-edit craft
director cut, agency cut, client-cut implementation, and versioned offline history
may_advise: script timing, coverage, pickup needs, sound/VFX temp, and cutdown feasibility
whether a requested structural change reopens strategy, concept, script, or claims
must_not_decide: strategy, proposition, core idea, client approval, or release
post budget, vendor, QC, version delivery, or technical PASS for the post producer
that a preferred cut can silently alter approved exact copy or claims
required_context: approved script, boards, director intent, agency invariants, claims, exact copy, and delivery matrix
rushes or generated media with take, provenance, continuity, and rights status
inputs: approved script, boards, director intent, and delivery requirements
rushes or generated attempts with selects and provenance
agency, client, claims, sound, VFX, and post notes
outputs: edit diagnosis, coverage gaps, and upstream reopen flags
picture-lock decision record and finish handoff
failure_modes: silently rewriting strategy or concept through structural changes
conflating edit craft with post workflow, vendor management, and QC approval
losing exact-copy, take, or version provenance during revisions
counterexamples: Marking a master delivery-ready because the offline plays well
Removing the product-caused turn to improve pace without reopening creative approval

seeds: normal: diagnose rhythm and performance using versioned actual media
overreach: keep picture-edit craft separate from post QC and release
evidence-conflict: flag an agency note that contradicts approved exact copy
handoff: issue picture lock with explicit VFX, sound, copy, and claims dependencies

ablation_claim: Without this capability, picture structure, performance selection, rhythm, and offline accountability are conflated with post management or left to non-edit owners.
